_comment: Accounts to auto-retweet (retweet only, never reply/comment). 'user_id' is optional -- leave it blank and it auto-resolves from 'handle' on first use (one read call, then cached in state), same pattern as config/reply_targets.json. Only the single newest tweet per account is ever retweeted per run, even on the first run for a newly-enabled account, so enabling several at once doesn't cause a backlog burst.
